seoTitle: Add a Special Character in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to insert special characters and symbols into your Canva designs to add polish and improve visual messaging.
intro: Special characters and symbols can add polish to a design and help convey ideas more precisely. This guide covers how to find and insert them into your Canva projects.

steps.heading: Access character options
steps.body: Open the text or elements panel in Canva where special characters and symbols are available for insertion.

steps.heading: Find the right character
steps.body: Search or browse through the available symbols to find the specific character that fits your design.

steps.heading: Add it to your design
steps.body: Insert the character into your text box or as a standalone design element, then adjust size and placement as needed.

steps.heading: Avoid common mistakes
steps.body: Make sure the character renders correctly across different devices and doesn't clash visually with your existing text.

faq.question: Can I use special characters in any text box?
faq.answer: Yes, most Canva text boxes support special characters, though rendering can vary slightly depending on the font chosen.

faq.question: Are special characters free to use in Canva?
faq.answer: Basic special characters are generally accessible on the free plan, though certain premium symbol sets may require a paid subscription.

faq.question: Can special characters help with branding?
faq.answer: Yes, using consistent symbols or characters can reinforce a distinct visual style tied to your brand messaging.

faq.question: What if a character doesn't display correctly?
faq.answer: Try switching fonts, since not all fonts support every special character the same way.
